Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 416}Oh, guess a new school semester started. I was wondering why I've been seeing so many students around.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 416}The world's a strange place these days. These kids better prepare themselves for the future.[n]{f 1 1}
